channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Hundred days of Israel’s latest war on Lebanon
item.description: Israel's second intensification of its war on Lebanon within two years has reached 100 days, killing thousands.

item.title: ‘Historic’ wave of Palestinian solidarity grows at universities in Germany
item.description: Calls for universities to cut ties with Israeli institutions are rising in the country that condemns the BDS movement.

item.title: Russian attacks kill 5 in Ukraine as Zelenskyy hails talks with US envoys
item.description: Ukraine's president hopes to reinvigorate diplomacy after 'very positive' talks with US envoys and European leaders.

item.title: Are Ronaldo, Messi still the largest World Cup draws, or is Mbappe bigger?
item.description: Has Kylian Mbappe surpassed Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi as the dominant superstar at the 2026 World Cup?

item.title: Trump courts boos at historic New York NBA Finals appearance
item.description: President Trump's appearance at Madison Square Garden overshadowed by boos, heavy security and political undertones.

item.title: Iran conflict: Why has oil stayed near $100 a barrel?
item.description: The worst-case oil scenario has been avoided, but inflation and slower growth continue to weigh on the global economy.

item.title: Iran says US has revoked World Cup ticket allocation for their supporters
item.description: Iranian players and support staff got US visas and landed in Mexico on Sunday for the World Cup, but now fans in doubt.

item.title: Ranking the Middle East and North African teams at World Cup 2026
item.description: Breaking down the eight Middle East and North African teams' chances at the World Cup in North America.

item.title: Indian crew rescued after attack on oil tanker off Oman
item.description: Indian crew rescued after attack on oil tanker off Oman

item.title: Deschamps backs hat-trick hero Olise to shine for France at World Cup
item.description: Michael Olise starred alongside Kylian Mbappe, Ousmane Dembele and Desire Doue in 3-1 win against Northern Ireland.

item.title: Protests erupt in Kenya over US Ebola quarantine centre in Nanyuki
item.description: Anger grows in Kenya as residents accuse the US of offloading Ebola risks onto Kenyans.

item.title: World Cup 2026: What time can fans in Europe, Middle East and Africa watch?
item.description: Are you a football fan in Europe, Africa or the Middle East? Scroll down to find out World Cup timings in your region.

item.title: ‘They were laughing’: Israel’s use of rape and sexual abuse in prisons
item.description: Former detainees detail systematic torture and sexual violence, including rape, while in Israeli custody.

item.title: Trump says Iran deal in ‘final throes’
item.description: Donald Trump said that he's in the 'final throes' of a deal with Iran.

item.title: Spain cruise past Peru in final World Cup 2026 warm-up match
item.description: Mikel Oyarzabal opens the scoring after two minutes as Spain comfortably win their final World Cup warm-up in Puebla.

item.title: China’s Xi, North Korea’s Kim pledge to boost ties at rare Pyongyang summit
item.description: President Xi Jinping is on a rare visit to North Korea, where he commits to deeper cooperation with Kim Jong Un.

item.title: Iran war day 102: Trump warns Israel against new strikes as ceasefire holds
item.description: Iran warns fighting could restart as tensions remain high and Trump urges Israel to protect the fragile ceasefire.

item.title: Wembanyama scores 32 as Spurs power past Knicks in Game 3 of NBA Finals
item.description: San Antonio Spurs net first win in Game 3 of best-of-seven NBA Finals with crucial 115-111 victory at New York Knicks.

item.title: Palestine weekly wrap: Israel presses deeper into Gaza as Cairo talks begin
item.description: Israel pushes deeper into Gaza, killing Palestinians across the enclave.

item.title: Iran’s lakes are vanishing: Satellite images show a deepening water crisis
item.description: Years of drought, falling rainfall and unsustainable water use have been worsened further by the US-Israel war.

item.title: Race to find survivors as Philippines quake toll rises to 37
item.description: The quake inflicted some of the worst damage on General Santos, a city of about 720,000 people in southern Mindanao.

item.title: Nuclear weapons spending surges to record high of $119bn, report says
item.description: International Campaign to Abolish Nuclear Weapons says states spent an extra $16.8bn on their nuclear arsenals in 2025.

item.title: ‘As close as lips and teeth’: The highs and lows of China-North Korea ties
item.description: Chinese President Xi has been welcomed in Pyongyang for his first visit since 2019.

item.title: Two years after Israel’s Nuseirat ‘rescue’ success, we are still bleeding
item.description: My family survived the massacre that freed four captives. Its wounds and nightmares have not left us.

item.title: India’s fertility rate falls below replacement level: Why it matters
item.description: India's fertility rate falls to 1.9 children per woman, with consequences for the workforce, the elderly and economy.
